title: bertya polymorpha
intro: Bertya polymorpha, also known as the 'Queensland bertya', is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. It is native to Australia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been reported to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving pain, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, Bertya polymorpha is often used to make infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal benefits.
